## What this project is
[One-paragraph description of the service, its bounded context, and its role in the system.]

## Architecture
- Pattern: Hexagonal / Clean Architecture
- Framework: Spring Boot 3.x, Java 21
- Build: Maven
- Package root: `com.[company].[service]`
- Package structure:
  - `.domain`       тАФ entities, value objects, domain services, repository interfaces
  - `.application`  тАФ use-case services, DTOs, mappers (MapStruct)
  - `.infrastructure` тАФ JPA repos, Kafka producers/consumers, REST clients, AWS SDK
  - `.web`          тАФ REST controllers, OpenAPI annotations, exception handlers

## Key integrations
- Database: [PostgreSQL / Oracle / H2] via Spring Data JPA
- Messaging: [Kafka / IBM MQ / SQS] тАФ topics: [list topics]
- Auth: [Spring Security + Keycloak / OAuth2 / JWT]
- Downstream services: [list REST clients and URLs by environment]
- Mainframe: [IBM MQ / REST Gateway / None]

## Naming conventions
- Services: `[Entity]Service` (interface) + `[Entity]ServiceImpl` (impl)
- DTOs: `[Entity]Request`, `[Entity]Response`, `[Entity]Dto`
- Repositories: `[Entity]Repository` (Spring Data interface)
- Mappers: `[Entity]Mapper` (MapStruct interface, auto-generated impl)
- Controllers: `[Entity]Controller`
- Exceptions: `[Entity]NotFoundException`, `[Entity]ValidationException`

## Coding standards (NON-NEGOTIABLE тАФ from eeik_bootstrap golden rules)
- Constructor injection ONLY тАФ no `@Autowired` on fields; all injected fields are `final`
- `jakarta.*` exclusively тАФ NEVER `javax.*` (Spring Boot 3.x)
- SLF4J only тАФ `log.info(...)` with parameterised messages; NEVER `System.out.println()`
- No `SELECT *` тАФ always specify explicit column list
- Parameterised queries only тАФ use `NamedParameterJdbcTemplate` or JPQL named params
- No hardcoded secrets тАФ use AWS Secrets Manager or env vars
- No `Optional.get()` without `isPresent()` тАФ use `orElseThrow()`
- No `new Date()` / `Calendar` тАФ use `java.time` (LocalDate, LocalDateTime, Instant)
- No empty catch blocks тАФ log at WARN/ERROR minimum
- Conventional Commits тАФ `feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, `chore(scope):` etc.

## Test strategy
- Framework: JUnit 5 + AssertJ + Mockito 5
- DB tests: Testcontainers (PostgreSQL image)
- Integration: `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureWebTestClient`
- Contract: Pact (consumer-driven for downstream clients)
- Coverage gate: 80% line coverage minimum (enforced by JaCoCo)
- Use `Awaitility.await().until(...)` тАФ NEVER `Thread.sleep()` in tests

## PR requirements тАФ every PR must include
- [ ] Unit tests for all new public methods
- [ ] Javadoc on all new public classes and methods
- [ ] `@Operation` / `@ApiResponse` on all new controller endpoints
- [ ] Liquibase migration script if schema changed
- [ ] OpenAPI spec regenerated if contract changed
- [ ] No partial implementations тАФ all method bodies complete

## Environment URLs
- Dev:     [https://dev-api.company.com/[service]]
- Staging: [https://staging-api.company.com/[service]]
- Prod:    [https://api.company.com/[service]]

## Key eeik_bootstrap agents to use
- `java-developer` тАФ feature implementation within established patterns
- `java-tech-lead` тАФ architectural decisions and cross-cutting concerns
- `java-tester` тАФ JUnit 5 test generation
- `jacoco-coverage-tester` тАФ coverage analysis and gap filling
- `security-auditor` тАФ OWASP review before merging to main
- `aws-architect` тАФ CDK/Terraform infra changes

## What Claude should NOT do in this repo
- Do not redesign architecture without Tech Lead sign-off
- Do not add Maven dependencies not in the BOM without flagging `// REQUIRES: <dependency>`
- Do not use field `@Autowired`
- Do not use `javax.*`
- Do not generate `SELECT *`
- Do not write partial implementations
